settings.title: Community Exclusive
settings.description:
Sign up to our newsletter to receive 15% off your Christmas orders for a limited time only.

All of our designs are hand-crafted in our Sydney studio, where our team of skilled artisans pour their love and passion into every piece.

To ensure your holiday gifting arrives in time for Christmas, we encourage you to place your orders early. 

*Offer ends on Thursday, October 24th at 11:59pm and excludes new collections, bespoke orders and one-of-a-kind pieces.
